chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN EX28 Task release and Priority Bumping CR Config Guide]

Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Click System Codes on the bottom of the UI Select an already existing Code ID and click Copy Once an already existing record is copied, edit as following and click Save Ensure the enablement flag is checked Navigate back to system codes UI and click ADD Add the following and click Save Now find the newly created system code by filtering for code type and click on Parameters Add the following for parameters and click Save Navigate back to EX28 system code and click on Code IDs on the bottom of the UI Add the following and click Save Clear Cache!
